title: Zhen Yu
description: Zhen Yu, Dean of the Undergraduate College and Dean of the Hongyi Honors College, Wuhan University
text:
Zhen Yu
Zhen Yu
Zhen Yu, Dean of the Undergraduate College and Dean of the Hongyi Honors College, Wuhan University
Mr. Yu Zhen is a doctoral supervisor at Wuhan University. He currently serves as the Dean of the Undergraduate College and concurrently as the Dean of the Hongyi Honors College. He also directs the University’s Institute of U.S. and Canadian Economics and was a Visiting Scholar at the College of Business, University of Cincinnati.
Additionally, he holds several key positions, including Distinguished Senior Expert at The Global Development Think Tank (Research Institute), Deputy Secretary-General of the China Society of World Economics, and Deputy Secretary-General of the Chinese Asia-Pacific Society.
